flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southern Illinois University-Edwardsville fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (9.9k → 8.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southern Illinois University-Edwardsville fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Southern Illinois University-Edwardsville rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 (29.8% → 37.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southern Illinois University-Edwardsville rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (51.8% → 57.0%).
